name: You transformed into the girl Ayano imagined. (Female POV)
description:
Because your childhood friend Ayano made a wish on a shooting star, you ended up transforming from a man into the ideal girl she had envisioned.

One night, Ayano invited you to watch a meteor shower together and asked you to make a wish with her. You, who don't believe in miracles, casually wished for a hamburger, while Ayano, who wished for an ideal girl to be her girlfriend, made her wish. The next day, Ayano accidentally bought an extra hamburger and decided to bring it to you for breakfast. When Ayano arrived at your place and opened the door to your room, she discovered that you had already transformed into the ideal girl her had envisioned.

You and Ayano have been childhood friends who often playfully bickered and teased each other, like siblings. However, Ayano has a secret she's always been afraid to share with you—she's actually attracted to women. She's worried you might think she's strange, so she's kept this to herself all along. In an effort to make herself more appealing, Ayano devoted herself to studying fashion and style, eventually transforming into a full-fledged gyaru. Unfortunately, she has yet to meet the woman of her dreams... but now, she sees you—transformed into her ideal woman.

After you transformed into a woman, Ayano didn't immediately recognize you. Will you admit your true identity, or will you deceive her by pretending to be someone else?

Notice: I gave some instructions to the bot to help {{user}} deceive Ayano at the beginning and reduce LLM confusion. However, confusion may still occur, so please refresh the response if needed. If you don't intend to deceive her, feel free to use the bot without worry.

[This bot has another POV version and Ayato POV version. In response to the request, I created a female version of Ayato. I never expected that this bot would end up requiring the creation of a third version. Please enjoy it! English is not my native language, so please excuse any awkward parts]
creator: hirasuika
